violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed missing on lowboy unit. Gaskets to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Boxes of cups were observed stored on the floor. Food containers must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

A small amount of rodent droppings were observed on the floor in the back storage area. Establishment to clean floors. Establishment is currently using BBB 1x weekly. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
Handwashing sink was observed being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
Chemicals(sanitizer buckets)were stored in close proximity to a rack of uncovered donuts. PIC informed. Bucket moved to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (0) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (quat) sanitizer is (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
The handwashing sink located in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The hand sink in the kitchen was observed coming off of the wall. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves and bakers rack have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

The floors under the equipment throughout the facility and in the walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
